title: Level 34.5
wikitext:
{{VoidedThemeV2}} {{Class 1|safety=Persistent Safety Provided|security=Sustained Communities|entity=Minimal Entity Count|class=Habitable|hexagon=⚘|color-h=250}} Level 34.5 is the most populated sub-level of [[Level 34]], and within the safest sub-levels in the Backrooms. ==Overview== {{Simple Image Block|image=Level34.5-1.png|caption=A photograph of Level 34.5.}} Level 34.5 is a sprawling, vast sewer system, with the majority of the water drained, made of withered brick surfaces. Level 34.5’s one of the few Backrooms levels with a habitable environment and persistent security. General lighting is highly pervasive, and an extensive stake of Level 34.5 is insulated, almost echoing at every sound. Level 34.5’s architectural integrity and interior stand in stark contrast to [[The Hub]], with the drainage tunnel sprawling over hundreds of kilometers, its surface paved in the upper region; one might find ladders leading to sidewalks. Level 34.5 bears high stability, with a score of 0.1 on the [[Phenomenon 11|Instability]] scale, similar to [[The Frontrooms|baseline reality]]. Such stability makes it nearly impossible to [[No-Clipping|No-Clip]]. Additionally, Level 34.5 is perfectly stable without any effect of [[Phenomenon 14|Shifting Geometry]]. {{Simple Image Block|image=Level34.5-2.png|caption=A photograph of Level 34.5's subterranean tunnels.}} Level 34.5’s subterranean tunnels can be accessed via the sidewalks within drainage tunnels; these subterranean tunnels are well-infrastructured, whilst extending over a few kilometers each. Walls are decorated with graffiti and similar craftworks. Level 34.5’s subterranean tunnels may consist of various rooms within cavities; most of them are janitor closets, electric stations, boilers, and resting spaces. Many of them are currently used as colony territories by various groups. Level 34.5’s habitation comes from persistent labor to create a reliable accommodation for wanderers to rest; such craft is enabled by useful equipment of electric stations and boilers, and janitor closets with resting spaces allow high load-bearing capacity and create opportunities for communities to thrive. ==Entities== Level 34.5’s major entity population has been erased over the course of years; rarely, one might encounter [[Entity 3|Smilers]] in dark areas, or get infected with [[Entity 11|Hydrolitis Plague]], tho current community of Level 34.5 provides complimentary healthcare for any wanderer on all occasions. ==Colonies & Outposts== Level 34.5 is one of the most inhabited levels amongst [[Backrooms_Wiki:Levels_9-99|Levels 9 to 99]]; one may find hospitality and comfort at the entry of the level. ===⚘ Macrocolony ⚘=== Macrocolony is the biggest and most collaborative colony of the level, similar to the Megacolony of [[Level 399]]. Macrocolony serves as the government figure and works on a welfare state approach. Possibly influenced by 2003, Macrocolony began to grow exponentially and is still one of the most trustworthy colonies within the Backrooms. {{Simple Image Block|image=Level34.5-3.png|caption=A photograph of Macrocolony's art exhibits.}} Macrocolony is open to new members, with nearly 4 thousand members; many inhabitants work in daily jobs. It’s easy to find a residential spot or temporary accommodation for wanderers, and Macrocolony helps exclusively with the needs of wanderers. Macrocolony uses [[Almond Water]] as the main currency and has established trade halls for the free use of people, and various types of social exhibitions throughout the level, many of which include art galleries, collective units, security stations, and infirmaries. ===☼ Architect Industries ☼=== Founded by 41 members, also known as the “'''Site Nexus''',” it is a trading outpost established by the [[Architect Industries]]. Located 15 kilometers out from the Macrocolony, its main intent is to store a range of parts and collect new resources. Not much is known about the outposts, but it’s reported to be open for trade with wanderers. ==Entrances & Exits== ===Entrances=== Level 34.5 is permanently connected to [[Level 34]], and only a threshold has been found when plunging deeper into [[Level 34]]; exact conditions are undetermined; one may rarely encounter an ingress to Level 34.5 on occasion. ===Exits=== Level 34.5’s exits operate indeterminately and remain unexplained in most, but one might find methods listed below: *Rooms with vintage wallpapers might transition into [[Level 0]]. *Traveling through dark tunnels on prolonged occasions might lead to [[Level 6]]. *Delving deeper into a wall crack may lead back to [[Level 34]]. *Any kind of [[No-Clipping]] is observed to lead to [[Level 410]]. *Although not recommended, finding a manhole cover and climbing down will lead one into [[Waste Disposal]]. {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body='''Author''': [[User:UnpopularCat|'''UnpopularCat''']]
